sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, description VARCHAR);
UPDATE test_table SET description = regexp_extract(description, '([a-z]+)', 1) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, regexp_extract(description, '([a-z]+)', 0) as extracted FROM test_table;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE regexp_extract(description, '([a-z]+)([a-z]+)', 2) = 'de';
